sentences.target: Viele Studierende warten vor der Mensa.

translations.de: Viele Studierende warten vor der Mensa.
translations.en: Many students are waiting in front of the cafeteria.
translations.es: Muchos estudiantes esperan frente a la cafetería.
translations.fr: Beaucoup d’étudiants attendent devant la cafétéria.
translations.it: Molti studenti aspettano davanti alla mensa.
translations.ko: 많은 학생들이 학생식당 앞에서 기다리고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 许多学生在食堂门口等着。
translations.yue: 好多學生喺飯堂門口等緊。
translations.pt: Muitos estudantes esperam em frente ao refeitório.
translations.vi: Nhiều sinh viên đang đợi trước căng tin.
translations.ar: ينتظر كثير من الطلاب أمام الكافتيريا.
translations.nl: Veel studenten wachten voor de kantine.
translations.hu: Sok diák vár a menza előtt.
translations.hi: कई विद्यार्थी कैंटीन के बाहर इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Πολλοί φοιτητές περιμένουν μπροστά από τη λέσχη.
translations.id: Banyak mahasiswa menunggu di depan kantin.
translations.ro: Mulți studenți așteaptă în fața cantinei.
translations.ja: 多くの学生が食堂の前で待っている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite quantifier functioning as determiner; modifies a plural noun in subject position.
Nominalized present participle; plural, nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person plural; main predicate agreeing with the plural subject.
Preposition governing dative in a static/locative reading; introduces the prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; agrees with ‘Mensa’ as object of ‘vor’.
Feminine noun; object of the preposition ‘vor’; denotes location.

sentences.target: Ich helfe den Studierenden in der Bibliothek.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːn ʃtuˈdiːʁəndən ɪn deːɐ̯ ˌbɪbli̯oˈteːk/

translations.de: Ich helfe den Studierenden in der Bibliothek.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhɛlfə deːn ʃtuˈdiːʁəndən ɪn deːɐ̯ ˌbɪbli̯oˈteːk/
translations.en: I help the students in the library.
translations.es: Ayudo a los estudiantes en la biblioteca.
translations.fr: J’aide les étudiants à la bibliothèque.
translations.pt: Eu ajudo os estudantes na biblioteca.
translations.vi: Tôi giúp sinh viên trong thư viện.
translations.nl: Ik help de studenten in de bibliotheek.
translations.hi: मैं पुस्तकालय में विद्यार्थियों की मदद करता हूँ.
translations.id: Saya membantu para mahasiswa di perpustakaan.
translations.ro: Îi ajut pe studenți în bibliotecă.
translations.da: Jeg hjælper de studerende på biblioteket.
translations.ja: 私は図書館で学生を手伝います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite verb, present tense, 1st person singular; ‘helfen’ selects a dative object.
Definite article, dative plural; introduces the indirect object NP.
Nominalized participle; plural, dative; indirect object of ‘helfe’.
Two-way preposition; here locative use with dative; introduces a location PP.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; agrees with ‘Bibliothek’.
Feminine noun; object of the preposition ‘in’; denotes location.

sentences.target: Die Studierende fragt nach dem Hörsaal.

translations.de: Die Studierende fragt nach dem Hörsaal.
translations.en: The student asks for the lecture hall.
translations.es: La estudiante pregunta dónde está el aula.
translations.fr: L’étudiante demande où se trouve l’amphi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位女学生在问讲堂在哪里。
translations.yue: 呢位女學生問講堂喺邊度。
translations.ru: Студентка спрашивает, где находится лекционный зал.
translations.pt: A estudante pergunta onde fica o anfiteatro.
translations.he: הסטודנטית שואלת איפה נמצא אולם ההרצאות.
translations.vi: Nữ sinh viên hỏi giảng đường ở đâu.
translations.ar: تسأل الطالبة أين تقع قاعة المحاضرات.
translations.nl: De studente vraagt waar de collegezaal is.
translations.uk: Студентка запитує, де знаходиться лекційна аудиторія.
translations.hu: A hallgató megkérdezi, hol van az előadóterem.
translations.hi: छात्रा लेक्चर हॉल का पता पूछती है.
translations.el: Η φοιτήτρια ρωτάει πού είναι το αμφιθέατρο.
translations.id: Mahasiswi bertanya di mana aula kuliah.
translations.cs: Studentka se ptá, kde je přednáškový sál.
translations.da: Den studerende spørger, hvor forelæsningssalen er.
translations.ja: 女子学生が講義室はどこか尋ねます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; here feminine singular (supported by 3sg verb agreement) introducing the subject NP.
Nominalized participle; singular, feminine; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Preposition; with ‘fragen’ forms the fixed pattern ‘nach + DAT’ meaning ‘to ask about’.
Definite article, dative singular masculine; agrees with ‘Hörsaal’ as object of ‘nach’.
Masculine noun; complement of the preposition ‘nach’.

sentences.target: Der Studierende sucht noch ein günstiges Zimmer.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ʃtuˈdiːʁəndə zuːxt nɔx aɪ̯n ˈɡʏnstɪɡəs ˈtsɪmɐ/

translations.de: Der Studierende sucht noch ein günstiges Zimmer.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ʃtuˈdiːʁəndə zuːxt nɔx aɪ̯n ˈɡʏnstɪɡəs ˈtsɪmɐ/
translations.en: The student is still looking for an affordable room.
translations.es: El estudiante todavía busca una habitación asequible.
translations.fr: L’étudiant cherche encore une chambre abordable.
translations.it: Lo studente sta ancora cercando una stanza economica.
translations.ko: 남학생은 아직 저렴한 방을 찾고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这名男学生还在找一个便宜的房间。
translations.yue: 呢位男學生仲喺搵間平啲嘅房。
translations.ru: Студент всё ещё ищет недорогую комнату.
translations.pt: O estudante ainda está procurando um quarto barato.
translations.tr: Öğrenci hâlâ uygun fiyatlı bir oda arıyor.
translations.vi: Nam sinh viên vẫn đang tìm một phòng giá rẻ.
translations.ar: لا يزال الطالب يبحث عن غرفة رخيصة.
translations.nl: De student zoekt nog een betaalbare kamer.
translations.uk: Студент усе ще шукає недорогу кімнату.
translations.hu: A hallgató még mindig egy olcsó szobát keres.
translations.hi: छात्र अभी भी सस्ते कमरे की तलाश में है.
translations.el: Ο φοιτητής εξακολουθεί να ψάχνει για ένα οικονομικό δωμάτιο.
translations.nb: Studenten leter fortsatt etter et rimelig rom.
translations.id: Mahasiswa itu masih mencari kamar yang terjangkau.
translations.sv: Studenten letar fortfarande efter ett billigt rum.
translations.ro: Studentul încă mai caută uma cameră ieftină.
translations.da: Den studerende leder stadig efter et billigt værelse.
translations.ja: 男子学生はまだ手頃な部屋を探している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; introduces the subject NP.
Nominalized participle; singular, masculine; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; main predicate selecting an accusative object.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates continuation (‘still’).
Indefinite article, accusative singular neuter; introduces the object NP.
Attributive adjective inflected for neuter accusative singular; agrees with ‘Zimmer’.
Neuter noun; direct object of ‘sucht’.
